selectionCriteria: Category diversity (>=2 per used manifest category), all TypeScript (language mix deferred — CANONICAL_50 has no Python/JS templates), monetization potential, repo health (all score >=92)

entries.name: GitHub API
entries.selectionRationale: Developer platform with massive audience; natural devtools fit; high call volume from CI/CD and agent workflows

entries.name: GitLab API
entries.selectionRationale: CI/CD integration complement to GitHub; enterprise demand; pipelines and MR data are high-value

entries.name: CVE Search
entries.selectionRationale: Vulnerability scanning is core devtools use case; NVD data is enterprise-grade; security teams pay for speed

entries.name: VirusTotal
entries.selectionRationale: Premium malware analysis data; high value per call; SOC/IR teams are natural buyers

entries.name: URLScan
entries.selectionRationale: URL threat scanning; complements CVE/VirusTotal for full security devtools coverage

entries.name: Spotify Metadata
entries.selectionRationale: Massive consumer brand; music search has broad audience; high call volume from recommendation agents

entries.name: TMDB
entries.selectionRationale: Movie/TV data with huge audience; entertainment agents are a growing segment

entries.name: The Guardian
entries.selectionRationale: Quality news source; article search is high-volume; natural fit for research/summarization agents

entries.name: Podcast Index
entries.selectionRationale: Growing podcast market; discovery and search are natural agent workflows

entries.name: NASA Open Data
entries.selectionRationale: Iconic brand; free upstream API; APOD and NEO data have broad education + research appeal

entries.name: OpenAlex
entries.selectionRationale: Academic research database; growing replacement for Microsoft Academic; high value for research agents

entries.name: Project Gutenberg
entries.selectionRationale: Free ebook library; unique content source; NLP and education agents benefit

entries.name: Etymology & Definitions
entries.selectionRationale: Word origins and definitions; language tools have steady demand; unique niche in research category

entries.name: Flight Prices
entries.selectionRationale: High-value travel pricing data; obvious monetization — agents planning trips need real-time prices

entries.name: OpenSky Network
entries.selectionRationale: Real-time flight tracking; ADS-B data is unique and high-demand; aviation analytics

entries.name: Spoonacular
entries.selectionRationale: Comprehensive recipe + nutrition API; high call volume from meal planning agents

entries.name: API Football
entries.selectionRationale: Global football/soccer data; massive market; fixtures and standings drive high call volume

entries.name: ClinicalTrials.gov
entries.selectionRationale: Pharma/health data; high value per call; regulatory and research demand

entries.name: OpenAQ
entries.selectionRationale: Air quality data; ESG compliance and environmental monitoring are growing markets

entries.name: Holidays Worldwide
entries.selectionRationale: Reference data for calendar integration; travel and scheduling agents need holiday awareness
